rationale: V2 distinguishes FINISHED from IDLE; legacy collapses both. Headline fix.
V2 has a dedicated PREPARING state; legacy maps PREPARE to PRINTING.
V2 has a dedicated PREPARING state; legacy maps PREPARE to PRINTING.
V2 surfaces HMS codes as ActiveError; legacy drops print.hms[].
V2 surfaces ERROR via HMS severity=error or print_error overlay even when gcode_state is IDLE/FINISH; legacy drops HMS silently.
V2 surfaces HMS codes as ActiveError; legacy drops print.hms[].
V2 accepts stages 29/39 (H2D recovery); legacy falls through.
V2 surfaces ERROR via HMS severity=error even while gcode_state=RUNNING; legacy doesn't look at HMS.
